keyPoints: OpenAI rolls out GPT-5.6 after government greenlight — and announces ‘ChatGPT Work’
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de tecnologia.
fullArticle:
The limited preview period is officially over.

The limited preview period is officially over.

About two weeks after OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 was caught up in regulatory drama — rolled out only to government-approved organizations during a “limited preview” period — the company has received the Trump administration’s green light for a public rollout of the model. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman called it “the best model we have ever produced.”

To celebrate, OpenAI also unveiled a new AI agent on the same day: ChatGPT Work. It’s billed as a combination of ChatGPT and Codex, allowing the everyday non-technical user to take advantage of Codex’s capabilities for non-coding tasks, and it’s powered by the GPT-5.6 model suite (Sol, Terra, and Luna). “It can gather context from the apps, files, and workflows you ...
